title: Verify the functionality of the 'Reset' button
test_steps: Click on the 'Reset' button at the bottom of the screen.
expected_result: The array should be reset to its initial state.

title: Verify the functionality of the 'Step' button
test_steps: Click on the 'Step' button at the bottom of the screen.
expected_result: The next step of the Bubble Sort algorithm should be executed.

title: Verify the functionality of the 'Run' button
test_steps: Click on the 'Run' button at the bottom of the screen.
expected_result: The Bubble Sort algorithm should be executed until the array is sorted.

title: Verify the 'Test' button functionality
test_steps: Click on the 'Test' button at the top right corner of the screen.
expected_result: The current state of the array should be displayed in the visual representation.

title: Verify the visual representation of the array
test_steps: Observe the visual representation of the array.
expected_result: The visual representation should accurately reflect the current state of the array.

title: Verify the 'Step' and 'Run' button interaction
test_steps: Click on the 'Step' button multiple times. | Click on the 'Run' button.
expected_result: The 'Step' button should execute the next step of the Bubble Sort algorithm. | The 'Run' button should execute the Bubble Sort algorithm until the array is sorted.

title: Verify the 'Reset' and 'Step' button interaction
test_steps: Click on the 'Reset' button. | Click on the 'Step' button multiple times.
expected_result: The 'Reset' button should reset the array to its initial state. | The 'Step' button should execute the next step of the Bubble Sort algorithm.

title: Verify the 'Reset' and 'Run' button interaction
test_steps: Click on the 'Reset' button. | Click on the 'Run' button.
expected_result: The 'Reset' button should reset the array to its initial state. | The 'Run' button should execute the Bubble Sort algorithm until the array is sorted.

title: Verify the 'Step' and 'Reset' button interaction
test_steps: Click on the 'Step' button multiple times. | Click on the 'Reset' button.
expected_result: The 'Step' button should execute the next step of the Bubble Sort algorithm. | The 'Reset' button should reset the array to its initial state.
